title: Marvell Technology Earnings Dates and Reports 2026
text: Marvell Technology earnings schedule shows the company reported Q4 FY2026 results on March 5, 2026 with revenue of $2.22 billion and EPS of $0.80. The next earnings report is scheduled for May 27, 2026, for Q1 FY2027 results. Analyst expectations for Q1 FY2027 project EPS of $0.76 and revenue of approximately $2.40 billion. The company's guidance provided on the Q4 earnings call projects FY2027 revenue approaching $11 billion and FY2028 revenue near $15 billion. Key revenue drivers include data center custom silicon, optical interconnect products, and Ethernet switching. The company's valuation reflects strong market confidence, with the stock trading near all-time highs following recent earnings and guidance announcements. Management commentary emphasizes accelerating demand across all AI infrastructure categories.
